name: Clover Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, shortening, milk, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add egg and beat into creamed mixture.
3. Gradually mix flour, salt, and baking soda into the creamed mixture at low speed just until blended. Stir in candy-coated pieces.
4. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough 3 inches (7 cm) apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time in oven for 8 to 10 minutes for chewy cookies, or 11 to 13 minutes for crisp cookies. Do not overbake. Cool cookies on baking sheet for 2 minutes before removing them to foil to cool completely. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
